package rulecoverage

func NegativeHeaderInjectionViaUserInput() string {
    ruleID := "header_injection_via_user_input"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`w.Header().Set(name, userInput)` or `w.Header().Add(name, userInput)` where the value contains unvalidated user input that could contain `\\r\\n`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
